title: 2. Female Trainer – Digital Marketing, Social Media, Photography and Branding
description:
About ACE/PPC
Premium Performance Consulting (PPC) is a specialized Afghan consulting firm providing monitoring, evaluation, third-party monitoring (TPM), independent assessments, verification services, research, data management, and quality assurance solutions for development and humanitarian programs across Afghanistan. PPC has supported a wide range of assignments for UN agencies, international organizations, NGOs, and government institutions, delivering evidence-based insights, performance measurement, beneficiary verification, and accountability services that strengthen program effectiveness and decision-making.
PPC serves as a strategic domain partner within the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) Ecosystem . Established in 2012, ACE is a leading Afghan consulting and development services organization with nationwide operations and regional offices across Afghanistan. ACE specializes in private sector development, business development services (BDS), value chain development, livelihoods, workforce development, capacity building, economic inclusion, research, and institutional strengthening, supporting governments, development partners, and private sector actors in achieving sustainable development outcomes.
The advertised position is with the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) and will contribute to ACE's portfolio of consulting and development assignments. Through the ACE Ecosystem partnership model, the position will benefit from the complementary expertise of PPC and other ecosystem partners, combining ACE's programmatic leadership and technical delivery capacity with PPC's strengths in monitoring, evaluation, verification, and quality assurance to deliver high-quality, evidence-driven development solutions across Afghanistan.
Interested applicants should submit:
Updated CV
Cover letter clearly mentioning the trainer position(s) applied for
Relevant sample training materials, portfolio, or evidence of similar assignments, if available
Contact details of two professional references

Job Descriptions
Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE), through the ACE/PPC Ecosystem, is implements capacity-building projects aimed at strengthening women-owned and women-led businesses in Afghanistan. The projects provide practical training and follow-up mentoring/coaching support to women entrepreneurs in key business development areas, including business registration, legal compliance, taxation, digital marketing, procurement readiness, access to finance, and business growth.
ACE/PPC Ecosystem is seeking qualified and experienced female trainers for the following thematic areas.
Purpose of the Position: The Trainer will deliver practical training and mentoring to women-owned and women-led businesses on digital marketing, social media use, product photography, branding, content development, and basic digital marketing planning.

Job Requirements
Main Training and Mentoring Areas
· Use of social media platforms for small business promotion.
· Basic digital tools for business visibility and customer engagement.
· Product photography using available/simple tools.
· Branding, messaging, and content development for women-owned businesses.
· Preparation of simple digital marketing plans and posting schedules.
Key Responsibilities
· Develop, review, and adapt training materials related to digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Prepare session plans, agendas, exercises, live demonstrations, and practical examples.
· Deliver interactive and practical training sessions to women entrepreneurs.
· Facilitate hands-on exercises on social media pages, content design, product photos, branding, and customer engagement.
· Conduct pre- and post-training assessments, where required.
· Provide practical templates and tools, including content calendars, simple brand guides, caption samples, and digital marketing plan templates.
· Provide follow-up mentoring/coaching to selected participants on improving their online presence and business visibility.
· Support participants in applying digital marketing practices to their own products and services.
· Document participant progress, key challenges, and success stories, where applicable.
· Coordinate with ACE/PPC Ecosystem project staff on logistics, attendance, documentation, and reporting.
· Prepare brief training and mentoring reports, including observations, participant feedback, challenges, and recommendations.
· Ensure all sessions are respectful, inclusive, culturally appropriate, and gender-sensitive.
Expected Deliverables
· Training agenda and session plan.
· Final/adapted training materials on digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Practical templates/tools, such as digital marketing plan, content calendar, branding checklist, and product photography checklist.
· Pre- and post-test tools, where required.
· Participant attendance lists.
· Training completion report.
· Mentoring/coaching session notes and participant progress updates.
· Photos/videos and other training evidence, as required.
Required Qualifications and Experience
· Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, ICT, Business Administration, Media, Design, Development Studies, or another relevant field. Master’s degree is preferred.
· Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in digital marketing, social media management, branding, photography, business development, entrepreneurship support, or MSME mentoring/coaching.
· Proven experience delivering training and/or coaching to women entrepreneurs, MSMEs, private sector actors, or business groups.
· Strong practical knowledge of social media platforms, digital tools, content development, product photography, and small business branding.
· Excellent facilitation, presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
· Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required; working knowledge of English is an advantage.
· Ability to travel to target provinces, if required.
· Previous experience with UN agencies, NGOs, consulting firms, or donor-funded projects is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified female candidates are invited to submit their applications to:
Email: business@pre-performance.com
Subject Line: Application – Female Trainer / [Mention Training Area]
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for written test, technical assessment, or interview.

Submission Email
business@pre-performance.com
Apply

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About Wadan Steel Company
About Wadan Steel Mill
Wadan Steel Mill is one of Afghanistan's leading steel manufacturers, committed to producing high-quality reinforcing steel bars that meet national and international quality standards. As part of our continued expansion, we are seeking an experienced, dynamic, and results-oriented Marketing Manager to lead our marketing initiatives, strengthen our market position, and drive sustainable business growth.
Why Join Wadan Steel Mill?
At Wadan Steel Mill, you will have the opportunity to contribute to one of Afghanistan’s leading industrial organizations and play a key role in supporting the country’s infrastructure development. We offer a professional working environment where innovation, integrity, teamwork, and continuous improvement are highly valued

Job Descriptions
Job Purpose
The Graphic Designer is responsible for developing creative and professional visual content that enhances Wadan Steel's brand identity and supports the company's marketing, sales, and corporate communication activities. The role ensures consistent branding across all print and digital platforms while promoting Wadan Steel's products, services, and corporate image.
Key Responsibilities
Edit and produce high-quality videos for digital, social media, and promotional platforms.
Trim, arrange, and enhance video footage by adding graphics, transitions, effects, music, and subtitles.
Design and produce high-quality marketing materials, including brochures, catalogs, product profiles, flyers, banners, billboards, signage, packaging, and corporate stationery.
Develop engaging digital content for the company's website, social media platforms, email campaigns, and online advertisements.
Create product visuals, technical datasheets, info-graphics, presentations, and promotional materials for Wadan Steel's products and projects.
Ensure all designs comply with the company's branding guidelines and maintain a consistent corporate identity.
Work closely with the Marketing, Sales, and Production departments to develop creative concepts that support business objectives and promotional campaigns.
Capture and edit photographs and videos of the company's facilities, production processes, products, projects, and events for marketing and documentation purposes.
Coordinate with printing houses, advertising agencies, media partners, and external suppliers to ensure timely and high-quality production of marketing materials.
Maintain and organize the company's digital asset library, including logos, templates, images, and design files.
Stay informed about design trends, digital marketing practices, and new creative technologies to improve marketing effectiveness.
Support corporate events, exhibitions, product launches, CSR activities, and other promotional initiatives through creative design and branding.
Perform any other marketing and graphic design duties assigned by the Marketing Manager.

Job Requirements
Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in graphic design, branding, or marketing communications. Experience in the manufacturing, construction materials, industrial, or steel sector is highly preferred. Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, Multimedia, Visual Communication, Marketing, or a related field
Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other graphic design software.
Working knowledge of Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar video editing software is an advantage.
Strong understanding of branding, typography, layout, color theory, and print production.
Creativity, attention to detail, and the ability to produce high-quality designs under tight deadlines.
Strong communication, teamwork, and organizational skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
Good command of English, Dari, and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
How to Apply
Interested qualified candidates should submit their CVs with a cover letter explaining their motivation in applying for the job and highlighting their relevant skills and experience to the following email address.
Candidates must clearly write the Reference and Job Title in the subject of line otherwise your application will not be considered.
· Copies of relevant academic and professional qualifications

Applications should be sent to:
Email: hr@wadansteel.com
+93707978068 or +93765328601

title: Graphic Designer / Motion Artist
description:
About Azizi Bank
Azizi Bank (www.azizibank.af) is a commercial bank set up in Afghanistan as per the terms of the licensing policy of Da Afghanistan Bank, the central bank of the country. The bank was granted a license on 13th June 2006 and commenced operations on the same date. Azizi Bank, a product of Afghan vision and enterprise, has been promoted by Mr. ‘Mirwais Azizi of the Azizi Hotak Group & Family.
Azizi Bank is the highest lender in the country, contributing to almost 40% of loans disbursed in the economy in different sectors of the country, especially in the areas of infrastructure lending, transmission lines, and optical fibers. The bank has an aggressive policy for financial inclusion. Azizi Bank is also ranked the highest in the country in terms of number of depositors.
The management team at the bank is a mix of youth and experience and is ably supported by a young & well-trained operating team aiming at transforming the banking scenario in the country by offering a truly professional and pleasurable experience to the customers. The bank today has a 1750+ strong team of employees, and with a 14% female workforce, it's playing a quiet but effective role in women’s emancipation and empowerment. Large investments have been made by the bank in physical infrastructure and technology with a view to providing the right ambience and latest facilities to prospective customers as per international standards.
The bank has 76 branches & 4 extension counters, thus playing a pioneering role in the development of the banking culture in the country. The bank today has 100 ATMs spread across Kabul and the major provinces of Afghanistan, which are all fully networked under Core Banking/Any Branch Banking and connected to a centralized database. By the end of Dec 2020, the bank is poised to have 200 ATMs, thereby emerging as the clear market leader on the ATM network in Afghanistan. With its 100% subsidiary bank, Islamic Bank of Afghanistan (formerly Bakhtar Bank), the group has more than 145 branches and stands as the largest banking network in the country.

Job Descriptions
Description
Create visually compelling graphics and animations for campaigns, corporate content, and digital platforms. Collaborates closely with the Senior Creative Producer to enhance visual storytelling and maintain brand consistency.
Duties and Responsibilities
- Design graphics, visual assets, and motion graphics for TV, digital media, and social platforms.
- Develop branding elements that align with Azizi Group’s identity.
- Collaborate with videographers, editors, and producers to integrate graphics into video content.
- Adapt designs for multiple media formats including social media, print, and presentations.
- Stay updated with design trends, animation techniques, and software updates.
- Ensure timely delivery of design projects while maintaining high-quality standards.

Job Requirements
Requirements
- Proven experience in graphic design or motion graphics for professional media production (4+ years).
- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere).
- Strong knowledge of typography, color theory, composition, and visual storytelling.
- Ability to translate complex concepts into simple, engaging visuals.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their resumes with a detailed application letter and contact details no later than Jul 16, 2026, to am.nooryar@azizibank.af.
The name of the position and vacancy number must be written in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application may not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test.

Submission Email
am.nooryar@azizibank.af.
Apply

title: Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect.
category: Information Technology, Management, Supply Chain, Communication, Accounting, IT
description:
About Etimad Maihan group
Etimad Maihan Group is an Afghan-owned construction and engineering company with an established presence across Afghanistan, employing a team of 20 to 50 professionals across project management, engineering, civil works, and operations. Founded and led by Afghan nationals, the company has built its reputation through the successful delivery of residential, commercial, and infrastructure construction projects, working in compliance with Afghan Ministry of Urban Development and Housing standards and international quality benchmarks.
With a strong foundation in the Afghan construction sector, Etimad Maihan Group is now investing in its next strategic phase: the development of BuildPrice NSW, a technology platform being launched in Australia. BuildPrice NSW applies artificial intelligence to automate construction cost estimation — enabling clients to upload architectural drawings and receive an instant, itemised Bill of Quantities priced at current market rates. This platform is the first of its kind in the Australian construction market and represents Etimad Maihan Group's expansion from physical construction into construction technology.
The development team for BuildPrice NSW will be based in Afghanistan, working under the direct leadership of the Group's Director and reporting to the Australian operation. This arrangement reflects the Group's commitment to creating skilled technology employment in Afghanistan while delivering an internationally competitive product. Etimad Maihan Group offers its technology team members direct exposure to the Australian construction market, hands-on experience with current AI technologies including the Anthropic Claude API, and a genuine opportunity to grow with a company at the beginning of its international journey.
The Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect role is the founding technical position within this division and represents a significant career opportunity for a highly qualified Afghan software engineer.
Mandatory
• Minimum 5 years of professional full-stack software development experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead capacity.
• Bachelor's degree (B.Sc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a closely related technical discipline.
• Demonstrable experience having led or co-led the full build of a production web application — from architecture through to deployment. Portfolio or GitHub evidence required.
• Strong command of both frontend (React ecosystem) and backend (Node.js or Python) development — not a specialist in one at the expense of the other.
• Proven ability to write clean, documented, maintainable code that other developers can work with and extend.
• Professional proficiency in English — written and spoken — sufficient to communicate requirements, documentation, and technical decisions clearly with an Australian director.
Preferred
• 5+ years of experience (beyond the minimum) with increasing scope and seniority.
• Prior experience as a founding engineer or CTO equivalent at a startup or early-stage company.
• Demonstrable experience mentoring junior developers and conducting systematic code reviews.
• Experience working in an ISO 27001, SOC 2, or similar security-conscious engineering environment.

Job Descriptions
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. System Architecture & Technical Leadership
• Design and own the complete system architecture for all three platform components: customer portal, backend API, and internal ERP.
• Define technology standards, coding conventions, branching strategy, code review protocols, and deployment pipelines that all team members must follow.
• Produce and maintain architecture decision records (ADRs) for every major technical decision, including database schema design, API structure, third-party integrations, and AI pipeline design.
• Evaluate and select all third-party libraries, frameworks, SaaS tools, and cloud services — with rationale documented for each selection.
• Ensure all architectural decisions account for Australian data sovereignty, GDPR-adjacent obligations, and NCC/ABSA compliance where applicable.
2. Customer Portal (Frontend)
• Build and maintain the customer-facing web application using React 18+ and Next.js 14+ (App Router).
• Implement the drawing upload flow (PDF intake), real-time BoQ display, itemised pricing breakdown UI, scope adjustment interface, and job acceptance workflow.
• Ensure full mobile responsiveness, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), and sub-3-second page load on Australian connections.
• Build the user authentication system (email/password + Google OAuth), account management, notification system, and document download (BoQ PDF export).
• Integrate the Stripe payment gateway for deposit collection upon job acceptance.
3. Backend API
• Design and implement a RESTful (and where appropriate, GraphQL) API layer using Node.js (Express or Fastify) or Python (FastAPI or Django REST Framework).
• Design the PostgreSQL database schema covering: users, projects, BoQ line items, materials, trade rates, job lifecycle, contractors, invoicing, and audit logs.
• Build the pricing engine — the core module that takes extracted BoQ line items and applies current NSW market rates, supplier pricing, and trade margin rules to produce the final quoted price.
• Implement Redis caching for high-frequency pricing lookups and session management.
• Build the webhook and event pipeline for job status updates, contractor notifications, payment confirmations, and reporting.
• Implement row-level security and role-based access control (RBAC) covering: customer, operations staff, contractor, admin, and super-admin roles.
4. AI / BoQ Automation Engine
• Design and implement the end-to-end PDF drawing ingestion pipeline — from raw PDF upload to structured BoQ output.
• Integrate the Claude API (Anthropic) for intelligent extraction of room schedules, finishes schedules, fixture schedules, and specification data from architectural drawing sets.
• Build the structured data normalisation layer that converts AI-extracted raw text into validated, schema-conformant BoQ line items.
• Implement confidence scoring, exception flagging, and human review workflows for AI outputs that fall below acceptable confidence thresholds.
• Build the feedback loop system — where corrections made by the operations team are used to continuously improve extraction accuracy over time.
• Optimise the pipeline for speed: target under 3 minutes from drawing upload to delivered BoQ for a standard residential drawing set.
5. Internal ERP (Operations Back-Office)
• Design and build the internal ERP used by the BuildPrice NSW operations team for day-to-day management of jobs, pricing, contractors, and reporting.
• Key ERP modules to deliver: Job Dashboard (all active jobs and their status), Pricing Database Manager (trade rates, material costs, supplier pricing), Contractor Management (profiles, licences, availability, performance ratings), BoQ Review & Override Interface, Financial Reporting (invoicing, GST, margin tracking), and Quality Control checklists.
• Build role-specific dashboards for: operations manager, pricing analyst, contractor coordinator, and executive/founder views.
6. Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
• Set up and maintain the full AWS infrastructure on ap-southeast-2 (Sydney): EC2 or ECS for compute, RDS PostgreSQL for the primary database, ElastiCache Redis, S3 for drawing storage, CloudFront CDN, Route 53 DNS, ACM for SSL, and Secrets Manager for credentials.
• Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions: automated testing, linting, build, staging deployment, and production deployment with rollback capability.
• Implement monitoring and alerting using CloudWatch and/or Datadog: uptime monitoring, performance metrics, error alerting, and cost monitoring.
• Implement automated backups, disaster recovery procedures, and document RPO/RTO targets.
7. Team Leadership
• Once the broader Phase 1 team is assembled, lead and mentor 6 additional specialists: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, AI/BoQ Engineer, QA/Test Engineer, DevOps Engineer, and Project Manager.
• Conduct weekly technical stand-ups (10:00 AM Kabul time.), code reviews, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
• Define and enforce code quality standards, peer review requirements, and testing coverage targets across all team members.
• Be the primary technical liaison between the development team and the Founder — translating business requirements into technical specifications, and technical constraints into business impact.

Job Requirements
REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS — MANDATORY
Candidates must demonstrate strong hands-on experience across all of the following. Applications without evidence of these skills will not be considered.
Frontend
React 18+
Next.js 14+ (App Router)

title: مفتش تکنالوژی معلوماتی
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه : بررسی سیستم های تکنالوژی معلوماتی به منظور حصول اطمینان از تأمین شفافیت، امنیت، موثریت و مطابقت آن با اهداف، پالیسی ها و معیار های ملی و بین المللی در واحد های مربوط اداره

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت ها:
الف) وظایف اساسی:
· بررسی سیستم های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و پالیسی های امنیت سایبری و ارایه مشوره برای تقویت آن ها.
· بررسی سطح دسترسی کارمندان به سیستم ها و معلومات مهم به منظور جلوگیری از سوء استفاده و تهدیدات احتمالی.
· سهم گیری فعال در اتخاذ تصامیم در خصوص تکنالوژی معلوماتی جهت جلوگیری ازاجراآت غیرقانونی در واحد های تحت بررسی مربوط اداره.
· تفتیش و بازرسی موارد مرتبط به بخش تکنالوژی معلوماتی که از طرف رئیس مربوطه و مقام اداره لازم دانسته می شود، درسطح ادارات مربوطه غرض دستیابی به نتایج متوقعه.
· ارایه مشوره و نظریات اصلاحی حین تفتیش سیستم های تکنالوژی معلوماتی به مسؤلین بخش های اداره جهت بهبود در اجراآت مربوط.
· حصول اطمینان از چگونگی تطبیق ، مقررات، طرزالعمل ها و رهنمود مرتبط به تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· بررسی و تفتیش از سیستم ذخیره اطلاعات جهت اطمینان از حفظ و نگهداری درست معلومات.
· بررسی سیستم های مدیریت معلوماتی ( MIS ) و موثریت نرم افزار های کاربردی اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی.
· بررسی میزان استفاده موثر از منابع IT ( سخت افزار ، نرم افزار ) و ارایه مشوره های لازم جهت بهینه سازی آن ها.
· بررسی قرارداد ها و تفاهمنامه های تخنیکی IT به منظور رعایت مفاد تخنیکی و حقوقی آن.
· ارائه گزارش‌های جامع، بی‌طرفانه و مستند در خصوص وضعیت سیستم های تکنالوژی و احصائیه معلوماتی.
ب) وظایف مدیریتی:
· ترتیب پلان کاری ماهانه،ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان ریاست، به منظور رسیدن به اهداف تعیین شده .
· ارایه گزارش ماهانه، ربعوار، سالانه و عندالضرورت از فعالیت ها و دست آوردهای بخش به آمر مربوطه .
· اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از طرف آمر مربوطه مطابق به اهداف و پالیسی اداره سپرده میشود.
ج) وظایف همآهنگی:
· ایجاد هماهنگی و ارتباط مؤثر با ادارات تحت تفتیش در تمامی مراحل بررسی و اخذ نظریات اداره تحت بررسی در مورد یافته های تفتیش.
· ایجاد روابط و همکاری با سایر گروپ های مفتشین.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام:
1.تابعیت افغانستان را داشته باشد.
2.سن وی از (18) سال کمتر و از (64) سال بیشتر نباشد.
سویه تحصیلی: داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل لیسانس در یکی از رشته ها: ( تکنالوژی و معلوماتی، کمپیوتر ساینس، نت ورک، انجینری سخت افزار، انجینری سافت ویر ) از موسسات تحصیلی ملی و بین المللی داخل یا خارج کشور و به درجات بالاتر اسناد تحصیلی در رشته های فوق الذکر که به تایید نهاد های تعلیمی و تحصیلی را رسیده باشد ارجحیت داده میشود .
تجربه کاری: حداقل یک سال .
مهارت های لازم:
· قابلیت طرح و تعین خط مشی(پالیسی) اداره مربوطه.
· تسلط به یکی از لسان های رسمی( پشتو ویا دری).
· مهارت های کمپیوتری در برنامه های مرتبط به وظیفه.

Submission Guidelines
علاقمندان واجد شرایط می‌توانند فورم‌های درخواستی بست‌ متذکره را دانلود و بعد از خانه پری دقیق ضم اسناد تحصیلی و تجارب کاری خویش الی تاریخ ۱۴۰۵/۴/۲۵ به شکل آنلاین از طریق ایمیل آدرس tveta933@gmail.com و یا به شکل حضوری به آمریت استخدام، ریاست امور کارکنان اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی تسلیم نمایند.

description:

Zoom Byte is a leading IT training and services company based in Kabul, dedicated to empowering individuals with in-demand technology skills. As a Cisco Networking Academy and authorized Pearson VUE test center, Zoom Byte provides internationally recognized certifications and hands-on training to prepare students for global career opportunities. Alongside training, the company delivers professional IT solutions to businesses, contributing to the growth of Afghanistan’s digital ecosystem.

title: کارمند تکنالوژی کمره های امنیتی، ریاست حیرتان
description:
Role Summary
تأمین، حفظ و مراقبت سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، شبکه‌های کمپیوتری و کمره‌های امنیتی اداره به‌منظور تضمین امنیت اطلاعات، تداوم فعالیت سیستم‌ها، نظارت مؤثر بر ساحات تحت پوشش و فراهم‌سازی خدمات تخنیکی مورد نیاز برای بخش‌های مختلف اداره.

Duties and Responsibilities
· ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان مدیریت مربوطه جهت رسیدن به اهداف تعیین‌شده اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم و راه‌اندازی کمپیوترها، پرنترها، اسکنرها، تجهیزات شبکه و سایر وسایل تکنالوژی معلوماتی مطابق نیازمندی اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم، عیب‌یابی و حفظ و مراقبت کمره‌های امنیتی، دستگاه‌های ثبت تصاویر و تجهیزات جانبی آن.
· نظارت دوامدار از فعالیت سیستم کمره‌های امنیتی و اتخاذ اقدامات لازم جهت رفع مشکلات تخنیکی و جلوگیری از وقفه در فعالیت آن‌ها.
· ثبت، نگهداری و آرشیف تصاویر و ویدیوهای ثبت‌شده مطابق اصول، طرزالعمل‌ها و رهنمودهای نافذۀ اداره.
· بررسی و تشخیص عیوب شبکه‌های کمپیوتری، تجهیزات مخابراتی و سیستم‌های نظارتی و انجام اقدامات لازم جهت رفع آن‌ها.
· همکاری در نصب، توسعه و حفظ و مراقبت شبکۀ داخلی، اینترنت و سایر سیستم‌های ارتباطی اداره.
· انجام سرویس‌های وقایوی و ترمیمی تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی و کمره‌های امنیتی به منظور جلوگیری از خرابی‌های احتمالی.
· مدیریت حساب‌های کاربری، دسترسی‌های سیستم و رعایت تدابیر امنیت سایبری در هماهنگی با مسئولین مربوطه.
· تهیه راپورهای تخنیکی در مورد وضعیت تجهیزات، سیستم‌ها، مشکلات موجود و اقدامات انجام‌شده جهت ارائه به مدیر مربوط.
· ارائه همکاری‌های تخنیکی به کارکنان اداره در زمینه استفاده از سیستم‌های کمپیوتری، نرم‌افزارها و تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· اشتراک در بررسی نیازمندی‌های تخنیکی اداره و ارائه پیشنهادات لازم جهت بهبود سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و امنیتی.
· کنترول و نظارت از ذخیره‌گاه‌های معلوماتی، سرورها و تجهیزات مربوطه جهت تأمین مصئونیت و دسترسی به اطلاعات.
· حفظ و مراقبت اسناد، تجهیزات و وسایل تخنیکی سپرده‌شده مطابق اصول و مقررات اداره.
· ترتیب و ارائه گزارشات ماهوار، ربعوار، سالانه از فعالیت ها و دست آورد ها مدیر مربوطه.
· اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از سوی آمرین ذیصلاح مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره سپرده می‌شود.

Job Requirements
· داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل فوق بکلوریا در رشته‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، کمپیوتر ساینس یا سایر رشته‌های مرتبط به وظیفه.
· داشتن حداقل ۲ سال تجریه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه- حایز سند تحصیلی لیسانس از این حکم مستثنی می باشد.

Submission Guidelines
رهنمایی ثبت نام متقاضیان:
متقاضیان محترم برای ثبت نام روی لینک زیر کلیک نموده معلومات خویش را ارسال بدارند.
http://178.18.249.112:8080/Recruit/Applicant/ApplicantApply/494C8352-89E1-487E-A721-DA8BB7350821
درجریان ثبت نام موارد ذیل را در نظر داشته باشند:
１. تمام معلومات خویش را دقیق برویت اسناد درج نمایند در صورت نادرست بودن معلومات درج شده متقاضی از پروسه
حذف میگردد.
2. یک فرد صرف یکبار ثبت نام کرده میتواند.
3. در قسمت درج عنوان بست و کود بست دقت لازم نمائید.
آدرس: ریاست عمومی شرکت امارتی نفت و گاز افغانستان واقع کوتل خیرخانه جوار ناحیه هفدهم، کابل- افغانستان درصورت ضرورت به شماره ذیل تماس گرفته میتوانید: 0202930023
نوت: تنها برای کاندیدانی تماس گرفته میشود که در بست متذکره شارت لست گردند.
امتحان بست متذکره در ریاست شرکت امارتی نفت و گاز بندر حیرتان واقع ولایت بلخ اخذ میگردد.

title: Academic Administrator – Computer Science
description:
Role Summary
Are you a passionate, energetic and a result-oriented individual with strong managerial skills and solid knowledge? If yes, this opportunity is for you. Kardan University is seeking experienced and motivated Academic Administrators for the Departments of Data Science and Information Technology.
We offer an exciting work environment conducive to academic and professional development of our people. Kardan University offers a competitive salary in the higher education industry.

Duties and Responsibilities
Sharing academic administrative activities with department faculty and staff and ensure that all university and faculty relevant policies and procedures are being practiced in a streamline fashion.
Plan new student’s entry process including; preparation of the entry test paper, arrange candidate’s interview, prepare and conduct orientation for new students and prepare class schedules for both new and existing students.
Disseminate schedules to the students and the faculty members in timely manner
Plan and arrange the examinations as per the academic calendar and ensure to conduct examination in an organized manner.
Orient the departmental policies and procedures to the new faculty members and staff, provide Management Information System (MIS) tutorials, and orient the role(s) they are expected to fulfill in the context of the department's educational objectives.
Ensuring that the Faculty and University deadlines are met for the course selection, uploading of the exam results in the MIS system and submission of the examination reports to the secrecy.
Ensuring that all faculty members complete their respective course outlines within the semester’s timeframe.
Closely supervise the examination and evaluation process and ensure the transparency and accuracy of the student’s internal and external assessments.
Ensuring that students are properly advised.
Supervise the staff and student relations within the department, and when necessary, participation in the resolution of grievances and disciplinary problems.
Resolve student’s quires on timely manner.
Ensure to transparently conduct and report lecturer evaluation to the program dean by the end of each semester.
Plan new faculty induction prior to the start of the new semester and ensure to arrange the required resources.
Act as a point of contact for the full-time faculty, visiting lecturers, staff and students, dealing with enquiries and providing support.
Establish, maintain and use clear and effective means of communication with the faculty, staff and students.
Ensure that copies of all forms are up to date and appropriately stocked for use by students and/or staff.
Coordinate with the University’s communication office in telling the departmental success stories.

Job Requirements
PhD/Master (Computer Science) with at least 3 years of teaching and administrative experience at an institution of higher education.
Strong organizational, management, interpersonal and communication skills.
Ability to teach in English Language and command on any national language.
Degree must be attested by the Ministry of Higher Education of Afghanistan.
At least 80% Master Degree Marks or B grade in case of foreign degree.
At least 75% Bachelor Degree Marks or B grade in case of foreign degree.
The Bachelor’s, Master’s, and PhD degrees must demonstrate above 60% field consistency (Degree Relevance).

Submission Guidelines
Qualified candidates should submit their resume and cover letter (both in one document) via email to jobs@kardan.edu.af . Email applications must include the position title in the email subject line.
We thank all the applicants for their interest; however, only the shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a demo/test.
Email / Application Form: jobs@kardan.edu.af

title: Network Security Contractual employee
description:
Role Summary
The Network Security Engineer is responsible for protecting and strengthening the organization’s ISP and enterprise network infrastructure with a primary focus on network-level security architecture, routing, and switching environments. This role ensures the secure design, deployment, and operation of core and edge network systems, including firewalls, VPN gateways, routing platforms, and switching infrastructure.
The engineer will work with multi-vendor network security technologies such as Juniper SRX, Huawei, Sophos, and other enterprise security platforms, ensuring secure connectivity, traffic control, and threat prevention across backbone, access, and corporate networks. The role requires strong expertise in network protocols, traffic analysis, and secure network design to support highly available and resilient telecom environments.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design, implement, and maintain network-level security controls across core, distribution, and access layers.
Secure routing and switching infrastructure including BGP, OSPF, MPLS, and VLAN environments.
Configure and manage firewalls, IPS/IDS, and VPN gateways across multi-vendor platforms.
Implement and maintain network segmentation, VRF, VLAN architecture, and secure traffic isolation.
Apply and manage NAT, ACLs, port security, control-plane protection, and secure device management (SSH, AAA, TACACS+/RADIUS).
Support secure integration between ISP backbone, data centers, and enterprise networks.
Network Monitoring & Threat Detection
Monitor network traffic, flows, and logs to detect anomalies, attacks, and performance issues.
Analyze traffic patterns using network monitoring and security tools.
Identify and mitigate DDoS attacks, routing anomalies, and network-based threats.
Collaborate with NOC and security teams to maintain network availability and security posture.
Incident Response & Vulnerability Management
Investigate network security incidents and perform root cause analysis.
Respond to security events affecting routing, switching, and firewall infrastructure.
Conduct network vulnerability assessments and implement remediation measures.
Ensure secure configuration baselines across all network devices.
Policy Enforcement & Compliance
Enforce network security policies, standards, and hardening guidelines.
Ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory security requirements.
Implement secure access control for internal, external, and partner connectivity.
Documentation & Continuous Improvement
Maintain up-to-date network topology diagrams, security architecture documentation, and configuration standards.
Document incidents, mitigation strategies, and lessons learned.
Stay updated on emerging network threats, vulnerabilities, and telecom security practices.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, Cybersecurity, or a related field.
Certification:
Required: CCNA, CompTIA Security+ (or equivalent)
Preferred: CEH, CCNP Security, JNCIS-SEC, or vendor-specific firewall certifications
Experience:
Minimum of three (3) years of hands-on experience in Network Security Engineering or Network Engineering, preferably within telecommunications or ISP environments.
Technical Skills

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (.NET / React)
description:
About Nasry Tech LLC
NasryTech is a US-based software company (registered in Washington State) building a modern construction
management platform that helps contractors manage leads, estimates, projects, communications, documents,
invoicing, and payments — all from one platform. We are an early-stage, founder-led startup building scalable,
user-friendly software for contractors and construction businesses.
Website: www.nasrytech.com

Job Description
Engagement Type: Independent Contractor · Fully Remote · Long-term
About the Role
We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack Developer to join our remote engineering team as an early technical hire.
You will build features end-to-end — from database to user interface — help shape the architecture of our
platform, and guide a small team of developers as we grow. This is a long-term, fully remote, independent
contractor engagement with real ownership of your work and the stability of an ongoing role.
The position is home-based and open to applicants worldwide.
What We Offer
• Competitive pay and a stable, long-term engagement.
• Fully remote work.
• Direct collaboration with the founder and genuine ownership of your work.
• The chance to grow with an early-stage product and shape its architecture.

Job Requirements
Duties & Responsibilities
• Design, build, and maintain features across the full stack, from database to UI.
• Develop secure, scalable backend APIs and services in C# / .NET, following Clean Architecture principles
(CQRS, dependency injection, domain-driven design).
• Build responsive, high-quality web applications using React and TypeScript.
• Apply engineering best practices: clean code, testing, and sustainable system design.
• Work closely with the founder and team to plan, prioritize, and deliver features.
• Lead and mentor a small team of developers — providing technical guidance, reviewing code, and helping
the team deliver high-quality software.
Required Qualifications (Must Have)
• 5+ years of professional full-stack development, building and deploying production applications.
• Strong expertise in C# and the .NET ecosystem, including Clean Architecture patterns (CQRS, dependency
injection, DDD).
• Strong experience with React and TypeScript, and a willingness to work across other technologies as
needed.
• Skilled with AI coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) to work efficiently — while reviewing,
testing, and taking full responsibility for all code.
• Strong written and spoken English for clear, proactive remote communication.
• Able to work independently, manage priorities, and deliver reliably in a remote setup.
Preferred (Nice to Have)
• Experience leading or mentoring a small development team.
• Experience integrating AI features into products (LLM APIs such as OpenAI or Anthropic, smart search,
chat assistants, automation).
• React Native / mobile development.
• Cloud and Infrastructure as Code (AWS, Terraform, serverless).
• SQL databases, payments integration (e.g., Stripe), and CI/CD.
• Previous SaaS or startup experience with America base companies.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to send their CV with a short cover note, a link to their GitHub or portfolio,
and a link to one C# / React project they have worked on (with one or two sentences describing their role).
Please also include in your email:
• Your country and time zone
•Your expected pay rate in USD
Please clearly indicate the position name and vacancy number — “Senior Full-Stack Developer / NT-ENG-001”
— in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications are reviewed on a
rolling basis.
Applications should be sent by email to: careers@nasrytech.com

title: Unix/Linux System Administrator
description:
Role Summary
The Unix/Linux System Administrator is responsible for the installation, configuration, administration, maintenance, security, and performance of Unix/Linux operating systems and supporting infrastructure. The role ensures the availability, reliability, and security of enterprise systems that host critical business applications and databases. The administrator also provides technical support, automates routine tasks, monitors system health, and participates in disaster recovery and capacity planning.

Duties and Responsibilities
Install, configure, upgrade, and maintain Unix/Linux operating systems (Red Hat Enterprise Linux, CentOS, Oracle Linux, Ubuntu etc.).
Administer physical and virtual Linux servers.
Perform regular system patching and OS upgrades.
Manage system start-up, shutdown, and service configuration.
Configure and maintain kernel parameters and system tuning.
Deploy, configure, and maintain enterprise server infrastructure.
Manage file systems, storage allocation, and disk management.
Monitor server health and ensure optimal performance.
Maintain hardware inventory and server documentation.
Create, modify, and manage user accounts and groups.
Implement security hardening based on organizational standards.
Manage SSH access, Sudo privileges, and password policies.
Perform vulnerability remediation and security updates.
Monitor security logs and investigate suspicious activities.
Monitor CPU, memory, disk, and network utilization.
Perform capacity planning and resource forecasting.
Tune operating system parameters for optimal performance.
Backup & Disaster Recovery
Configure and monitor backup processes.
Verify backup integrity through regular restoration testing.
Participate in disaster recovery planning and execution.
Maintain business continuity procedures.
Automation & Scripting
Develop automation scripts using Shell, Python, or Perl.
Automate routine administrative tasks.
Maintain scheduled jobs using Cron and system timers.
Improve operational efficiency through scripting.
Network Administration Support
Configure network interfaces, routing, DNS, and firewall settings.
Troubleshoot network connectivity issues.
Support load balancing and high availability environments.
Assist with VPN and secure remote access configuration.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, Information Systems, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience in Unix/Linux system administration within an enterprise environment.
Proven experience installing, configuring, upgrading, and maintaining Linux operating systems (Oracle Linux, Ubuntu).
Experience administering physical, virtual, and cloud-based Linux servers.
Strong experience with shell scripting (Bash) and automation of routine administrative tasks.
Well, understanding of Red Hat System Administrator.
Well, understanding Red Hat Engineer.
Oracle Linux Implementation Specialist (preferred)
VMware Professional (VCP) (preferred)
Configuration and communication between two servers (any OS)
Great knowledge of operating system.
Experience managing users, groups, permissions, authentication services (LDAP/Active Directory), and security policies.
Hands-on experience with system monitoring, performance tuning, troubleshooting, and capacity planning.
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) is an advantage.
Experience supporting enterprise applications and databases on Linux platforms.
Strong understanding of TCP/IP networking, DNS, SSH, NFS, firewalls, and storage management (LVM, SAN/NAS).

title: General Manager of Information Technology (GM-IT)
description:
About Kandahar Cement Company
Kandahar Cement Factory is a privately owned industrial enterprise dedicated to producing high-quality cement that supports Afghanistan's infrastructure, construction, and economic development. With a strong commitment to quality, operational excellence, and sustainability, the factory applies modern manufacturing practices and effective financial and operational management while ensuring compliance with applicable laws and industry standards.
As an important contributor to Afghanistan's industrial sector, Kandahar Cement Factory is committed to creating employment opportunities, supporting private sector growth, and contributing to the country's long-term economic development. Through continuous improvement, innovation, and responsible business practices, the factory strives to meet the evolving needs of the construction industry while delivering lasting value to its customers, employees, and stakeholders.

Job Descriptions
Support the factory's production processes by ensuring the reliability, stability, and efficient operation of the Information Technology (IT) infrastructure. Monitor, identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues in a timely manner to ensure uninterrupted operations and provide effective IT support across all factory departments.
Ensure the security of the organization's information systems, databases, and critical information assets by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring effective security controls. Safeguard the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational data in accordance with established cybersecurity standards, industry best practices, and the organization's information security policies.
Lead digital transformation initiatives by leveraging Information Technology (IT) solutions to automate and optimize administrative and operational processes, improve organizational efficiency and productivity, streamline workflows, and support data-driven decision-making across the organization.
Develop, implement, and oversee comprehensive Information Technology (IT) policies, standards, and operating procedures to ensure the effective governance, monitoring, security, and optimal utilization of IT resources across all functional areas of the factory, while supporting operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and organizational objectives.
Key Responsibilities :
Plan, design, implement, and manage the organization's Information Technology (IT) infrastructure, including enterprise networks, servers, telecommunications systems, and related technologies, to ensure high availability, reliability, scalability, security, and optimal performance in support of organizational operations and strategic objectives.
Ensure the continuous availability, stability, and security of enterprise networks, servers, databases, cloud environments, and cybersecurity infrastructure by implementing proactive monitoring, preventive maintenance, regular data backup and recovery procedures, and comprehensive information security controls to safeguard organizational data and ensure business continuity.
Oversee the management of on-premises data centers and cloud services, continuously monitor the performance, availability, and reliability of IT systems, and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency, system resilience, scalability, and long-term sustainability.
Develop, manage, and monitor the Information Technology (IT) budget while conducting strategic forecasting and planning for future technical, operational, and infrastructure requirements to ensure the cost-effective allocation of resources and alignment with the organization's long-term business objectives.
Manage and strengthen the security of information systems and databases by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring robust security controls that protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational information assets, ensuring compliance with cybersecurity standards, regulatory requirements, and industry best practices.
Develop, implement, and continuously enhance cybersecurity policies, standards, and procedures in alignment with internationally recognized frameworks, including ISO/IEC 27001, the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, and other relevant best practices; administer identity and access management (IAM) controls through the effective assignment and monitoring of user access privileges; and ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive organizational information through the implementation of comprehensive security governance, risk management, and data protection measures.
Conduct comprehensive cybersecurity risk assessments and implement effective risk management strategies; develop and execute incident prevention, detection, response, and recovery plans to address cybersecurity threats and security incidents; and design and deliver ongoing cybersecurity awareness and training programs to promote security best practices and strengthen the organization's overall security culture among Information Technology (IT) users and employees.
Lead the digital transformation of organizational and administrative processes by designing and implementing modern digital technologies and enterprise information systems that automate business operations, optimize information and data management, improve workflow efficiency, and enhance the quality, accessibility, and effectiveness of organizational service delivery.
Coordinate and collaborate closely with production, administrative, and executive departments to ensure the effective utilization of Information Technology (IT) solutions, support business process optimization, and drive continuous improvement of core operational workflows across the organization.
Establish and maintain effective professional working relationships across organizational units and ensure the timely, accurate, and structured reporting of Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and technological developments to relevant stakeholders, supporting informed decision-making and organizational transparency.
Provide regular, structured, and timely reports to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) regarding Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and strategic initiatives, while ensuring continuous coordination and effective collaboration with all relevant organizational units to support operational alignment, efficiency, and informed executive decision-making.
Liaise and coordinate with Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and oversee the design, negotiation, execution, and management of service-level agreements (SLAs) and contractual arrangements to ensure optimal service performance, quality assurance, reliability, and continuity of internet and communication services in alignment with organizational requirements.

Job Requirements
Education: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or closely related disciplines is required. Candidates possessing a Master’s degree in relevant fields will be considered an asset and given priority during the selection and recruitment process.
Professional Experience: A minimum of 5–10 years of progressive professional experience in the Information Technology (IT) sector, with demonstrated capacity in leading and managing technical teams, as well as a proven track record of planning, executing, and overseeing large-scale IT projects within reputable public, private, or non-governmental organizations, including both profit and non-profit sectors.
Comprehensive expertise in Information Technology (IT) hardware and software systems, with demonstrated ability to effectively operate, configure, manage, and support related technologies and enterprise systems to ensure optimal performance, reliability, and operational efficiency.

title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

title: Motion Graphic Designer
description:
About Yama Ramin Media Production & Technology (YRMPT)
Yama Ramin Media Production and Technology Company (YRMPT) is a well-established media production and technology company, officially registered with the Ministry of Commerce and Industries of Afghanistan. With a strong presence across the country, YRMPT delivers innovative media and technology solutions in collaboration with a diverse range of national and international organizations.
We work closely with leading telecom operators, as well as international NGOs, development partners, and humanitarian organizations, and various United Nations agencies. Our projects span media production, digital solutions, communication campaigns, and technology-driven services, contributing to impactful and sustainable initiatives nationwide.
At YRMPT, we value professionalism, creativity, innovation, and teamwork. We provide a dynamic working environment that encourages learning, skill development, and growth, while offering opportunities to work on high-impact projects with reputable local and international partners.
For more information about our company, services, and portfolio, please visit www.yrmpt.com .

Job Descriptions
Position Summary:
The Motion Graphic Designer will be responsible for designing and producing high-quality motion graphics, animations, video edits, and visual content for digital and broadcast platforms. The successful candidate will collaborate with the creative and production teams to transform concepts into compelling visual stories while maintaining high creative and technical standards.
Key Responsibilities
Motion Graphics & Animation
Design and produce high-quality motion graphics, 2D animations, and visual effects for commercials, social media, corporate videos, documentaries, promotional films, and awareness campaigns.
Create engaging animated content for digital marketing campaigns, presentations, websites, and multimedia projects.
Develop storyboards, style frames, and animation concepts based on project requirements.
Animate logos, titles, infographics, typography, and other visual elements.
Video Editing & Post-Production
Edit video content using industry-standard software.
Apply motion graphics, transitions, visual effects, color correction, and sound synchronization.
Collaborate with videographers, producers, and editors throughout post-production.
Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and project deadlines.
Graphic Design
Design static visual assets, including social media graphics, branding materials, brochures, presentations, banners, and marketing collateral.
Ensure designs are consistent with client branding and project objectives.
Prepare artwork for digital and print production.
Collaboration & Project Coordination
Work closely with the creative, marketing, and production teams to understand client requirements.
Manage multiple design and animation projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
Incorporate feedback from clients and internal stakeholders into final deliverables.
Stay up to date with industry trends, animation techniques, and emerging creative technologies.

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, Animation, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of professional experience in motion graphics, animation, graphic design, or multimedia production.
Strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in motion graphics, animation, video editing, and graphic design.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Blender, Cinema 4D, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator.
Strong understanding of animation principles, typography, composition, color theory, and visual storytelling.
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced production environment.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience working in a media production company, advertising agency, or creative studio.
Knowledge of 3D animation software such as Blender or Cinema 4D.
Experience with character animation, visual effects (VFX), or UI animation is an advantage.
Familiarity with social media content creation and digital marketing trends.
Excellent communication, teamwork, and time management skills.

Submission Guidelines
Interested Afghan candidates with the required qualification and experience should submit their applications electronically through hr@yrmpt.com email. To avoid confusions, disagreement and conflicts during recruitment process all applicants are required to clearly mention position title (Motion Graphic Designer) and vacancy announcement number (YRMPT-HR-072) in the subject lines of their emails otherwise, your CV's will not be considered for this post.
Please do not submit any other supporting documentation or educational certificates with your application unless you are requested.
Only short listed candidates will be contacted for interview/written test.

Submission Email
hr@yrmpt.com
Apply

title: متخصص سیستم سازی (برنامه نویس)
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه : ساخت سیستم های ERP و یکپارچه سازی سیستم های موجود در چارچوب ERP موردنظر اداره، همچنان ارائه راپور و گزارش به وقت و زمان معین .

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت ها:
الف) وظایف اساسی:
1. طراحی، توسعه، پیاده سازی و بهبود سیستم های ERP مطابق نیازمندی های اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی.
2. تحلیل نیازمندی های واحد های مختلف و تبدیل آنها به راه حل های نرم افزاری قابل اجرا در سیستم .ERP
3. نگهداری( Maintenance )و به روز رسانی سیستم های موجود به منظور اطمینان پایداری، کارایی و امنیت سیستم ها .
4. اجرای تست ها و عیب یابی سیستم ها به منظور اطمینان از عملکرد صحیح .
5. یکپارچه سازی ( Integration ) سیستم های مختلف اداره در چارچوب ERP جهت تبادل مؤثر معلومات و جلوگیری از تکرار داده ها.
6. ارتقاء و بهبود دسترسی پذیری، سرعت بارگذاری و امنیت و بسایت ها .
7. تهیه و مدیریت منظم نسخه های پشتیبان ( Backup )از دیتابیس ها و سیستم های اطلاعاتی مطابق پالیسی های امنیتی .
8. تشخیص، تحلیل و رفع مشکلات تخنیکی سیستم ها و ارائه راه حل های پایدار، معیاری و قابل توسعه .
9. تهیه مستندات تخنیکی شامل تغییرات سیستم، معماری نرم افزار و راهنمای استفاده .
10. ارائه آموزش و پشتیبانی تخنیکی به کاربران سیستم های ERP در سطح اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی.
11. جلوگیری از تکرار و بینظمی در ساخت دیتابیس سیستم مربوطه.
ب) وظایف مدیریتی:
1 . تهیه و تنظیم پلان‌های کاری ماهانه، ربع‌وار و سالانه با جزئیات دقیق، اولویت‌ها و زمان‌بندی مشخص، در راستای پلان منظور شده اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی به‌ منظور دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده.
2 . ارائه گزارش‌های ماهانه، ربع‌وار، سالانه و حسب ضرورت از فعالیت‌ها و دستاوردهای بخش، همراه با تحلیل نتایج و پیشنهادات جهت بهبود عملکرد به ریاست مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها
3 . اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط با مسئولیت‌های کاری که به‌صورت مشخص از طرف ریاست مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها مطابق با مقررات و اهداف اداره تعیین و به وی سپرده می‌شود.
ج) وظایف همآهنگی:
1. هماهنگی و همکاری با تیم سرور در نصب، کانفیگ، نگهداری و بهبود زیرساخت های سروری مرتبط با سیستم های .ERP
2. هماهنکی و تامین ارتباط با سایر بخش های مربوط و سایر بخش های ذیربط جهت انسجام بهتر امور.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام:
1. کاندیدا یا متصدی بست متخصص سیستم سازی(برنامه نویس)می­بایست که تابعیت افغانستان را داشته باشد؛
2. سن کاندیدا یا متصدی بست متخصص سیستم سازی(برنامه نویس)باید از (18) سال کم تر و از (64) سال بیشتر نباشد؛
رشته تحصیلی: کاندیدا یا متصدی بست متخصص سیستم سازی حداقل دارای سند تحصیلی (کارشناسی ارشد) یا مقاطع تحصیلی بلندتر در یکی از رشته­های (کمپیوتر ساینس – انجینری نرم فزار ) از موسسات تحصیلی داخل یا خارج کشور و به درجات بالاتر اسناد تحصیلی که به تایید وزارت تحصیلات عالی رسیده باشد ارجحیت داده میشود.
تجربه کاری: کاندیدا یا متصدی بست متخصص سیستم سازی(برنامه نویس)می­بایست حداقل 3 سال تجربه کاری مرتبط برای کارشناسی ارشد مد نظر گرفته شده است، به درجات بلندتر تجربه کاری مد نظر گرفته نشده است
مهارت های لازم:
React-Native و React یا, پایتون در Full Stack Devoloper ·
· بلدیت کامل با نرم افزار Git.
· تسلط کامل به توسعه Frontend با JS React
· تجربه عملی در طراحی و توسعه سیستم های ERP
· تسلط بر طراحی و مدیریت دیتابیس ها از جمله PostgreSQL: و MySQL
· توانایی در مدیریت پروژه و همکاری در تیم های چندنفره .
· مهارت در طراحی و توسعه( RESTful API ) APIs و انجام Integration بین سیستم ها
· آشنایی کامل با مدیریت و نگهداری سرور های لینوکسی Administration Server Linux
· توانایی تحلیل، طراحی و پیاده سازی سیستم های مقیاس پذیر Systems Scalable
· آشنایی با روش های تحلیل سیستم و تولید مستندات نرما زار UML و SRS
Python (Django & Django REST Framework - DRF) با Backend توسعه به کامل تسلط ·

Submission Guidelines
علاقمندان واجد شرایط می‌توانند فورم‌های درخواستی بست‌ متذکره را دانلود و بعد از خانه پری دقیق ضم اسناد تحصیلی و تجارب کاری خویش الی تاریخ ۱۴۰۵/۵/۶ به شکل آنلاین از طریق ایمیل آدرس tveta933@gmail.com و یا به شکل حضوری به آمریت استخدام، ریاست امور کارکنان اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی تسلیم نمایند.

title: متخصص سیستم سازی و انکشاف ورکشاپ ملی
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه: طرح، انکشاف، معیاری سازی و بهبود سیستم ‌های کاری ورکشاپ ملی به ‌منظور ارتقای کیفیت خدمات ترمیم و مدیریت تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.

Duties and Responsibilities
الف) وظایف و مسئولیت ‌ها :
الف) وظایف اساسی:
1. طرح و انکشاف سیستم ‌های مدیریتی، تخنیکی و عملیاتی ورکشاپ ملی .
2. مطالعه و تحلیل روند های موجود ورکشاپ و ارائه طرح ‌های اصلاحی جهت افزایش مؤثریت و کاهش زمان ترمیم تجهیزات .
3. تدوین، بازنگری و معیاری ‌سازی طرزالعمل‌ ها، رهنمود ها، لوایح، فورم‌ های مربوطه و پروسه‌ های کاری ورکشاپ .
4. ایجاد سیستم ثبت، تعقیب و گزارش ‌دهی تجهیزات وارده، در حال ترمیم و تحویل ‌شده .
5. طراحی و انکشاف سیستم مدیریت دارایی ‌ها، پرزه‌ جات، ابزار و تجهیزات ورکشاپ .
6. تهیه نیازمندی ‌های تخنیکی سیستم‌ های نرم‌افزاری مربوط به ورکشاپ و نظارت بر تطبیق آن .
7. ایجاد سیستم‌ های کنترول کیفیت خدمات ترمیم و ارزیابی عملکرد تخنیکی ورکشاپ .
8. تحلیل آمار خرابی تجهیزات و ارائه راهکار های کاهش هزینه ‌ها و افزایش عمر تجهیزات .
9. تهیه پلان‌ های انکشافی کوتاه ‌مدت، میان ‌مدت و دراز مدت برای ورکشاپ ملی .
10. بررسی و ابراز نظر پیرامون تکنالوژی‌های جدید مرتبط با تعمیرات تجهیزات ICT و ارائه پیشنهاد جهت تطبیق آن‌ ها .
11. ایجاد سیستم مدیریت دانش جهت ثبت تجارب، راهکار های تخنیکی و مستند سازی تعمیرات .
12. اشتراک در کمیته‌ های تخنیکی، پروژه ‌های انکشافی و برنامه‌ های اصلاحات اداری مرتبط با ورکشاپ .
13. ارائه مشوره ‌های تخصصی به رئیس تکنالوژی معلوماتی و آمر ورکشاپ در زمینه رشد ورکشاپ .
ب) وظایف مدیریتی:
1. تهیه و تنظیم پلان‌های کاری ماهانه، ربع‌وار و سالانه با جزئیات دقیق، اولویت‌ها و زمان‌بندی مشخص، در راستای پلان منظور شده اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی به‌ منظور دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده.
2. ارائه گزارش‌های ماهانه، ربع‌وار، سالانه و حسب ضرورت از فعالیت‌ها و دستاوردهای بخش، همراه با تحلیل نتایج و پیشنهادات جهت بهبود عملکرد به آمر مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها
3. اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط با مسئولیت‌های کاری که به‌صورت مشخص از طرف آمر مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها مطابق با مقررات و اهداف اداره تعیین و به وی سپرده می‌شود.
ج) وظایف همآهنگی:
1. هماهنگی با آمریت آی ‌تی در زمینه توسعه سیستم ‌های نرم ‌افزاری .
2. هماهنگی با متخصصین، انجنیران و کارمندان ورکشاپ برای تطبیق سیستم‌ های جدید .
3. هماهنگی با ادارات استفاده‌کننده خدمات ورکشاپ جهت دریافت نظریات، نیاز های تخنیکی و بهبود کیفیت خدمات .
4. همکاری با سایر ریاست‌ها و نهادهای ذیربط در پروژه‌ های انکشافی مرتبط با تکنالوژی معلوماتی.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام:
1.تابعیت افغانستان را داشته باشد.

title: System Admin Officer
category: IT - Software, Information Technology, Linux Administration
description:
Role Summary
The System Admin Officer is critically responsible for the end-to-end administration, security, optimization, and absolute continuous availability of Setaragan Mutahed’s – Star Pay core server architecture, Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization fabrics, and database systems. This high accountability role ensures zero-downtime operations for our nationwide transactional platforms, B2C mobile applications, and multi-operator network integrations.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ø Administer servers and core services (AD/DNS/DHCP where applicable), ensuring availability and secure configuration.
Ø Implement patch management, vulnerability remediation, and baseline hardening in line with security standards.
Ø Manage backups (daily/weekly/monthly), verify backup success, and perform periodic restore testing.
Ø Monitor system performance and capacity (CPU, RAM, storage), plan upgrades, and prevent outages.
Ø Support network and firewall teams with required system-side configurations for services, ports, and integrations.
Ø Manage privileged access, service accounts, and secrets handling using approved processes.
Ø Maintain system documentation: architecture diagrams, build documents, runbooks, and change records.
Ø Support DR/BCP readiness, including replication, standby systems, and recovery procedures.
Ø Perform monthly backup restore drills to verify recoverability of critical systems and databases, document results, and report any gaps for corrective action.
Ø Create, configure, and manage Virtual Machines (VMs) on Microsoft Hyper-V, including VM provisioning, resource allocation (CPU/RAM/storage), templates, snapshots/checkpoints (as per policy), and performance monitoring.
Ø Maintain Hyper-V host health and capacity, including storage management, patching coordination, and ensuring VM availability.
Ø Implement and maintain VM backup and recovery for Hyper-V workloads, aligned with the backup policy and monthly restore drills.

Job Requirements
Ø Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/IT or equivalent practical experience.
Ø 3+ years of hands-on system administration experience (Windows Server and/or Linux).
Ø Experience in backup/restore, patching, and server security hardening.
Ø Technical Skills
Ø Windows Server administration (AD/GPO, IIS) and/or Linux administration.
Ø Virtualization (VMware/Hyper-V) and storage concepts; backup solutions.
Ø Log review and troubleshooting; scripting basics (PowerShell/Bash) is an advantage.
Ø Understanding of security controls (least privilege, MFA, audit logs).
Ø Microsoft Hyper-V administration, VM lifecycle management, virtual networking (vSwitch/VLAN), and basic troubleshooting.
Ø Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
Ø Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills.
Ø Process-driven mindset; careful change execution with rollback planning.
Ø Good communication and documentation skills.
Ø Key Deliverables / KPIs
Ø Patch compliance and vulnerability closure within agreed timelines.
Ø Backup success rate and restore-test success rate.
Ø Server uptime and reduction of unplanned downtime.
Ø Quality of documentation and change records.
Ø Working Relationships
Ø Internal: IT Manager, NOC, Helpdesk, Development team, Compliance/Audit.
Ø External: Hosting/data center, backup/security vendors, software vendors (as needed).
Ø Confidentiality & Compliance
Ø The role holder must protect confidential information, follow approved access controls, and comply with the Company’s Information Security policies, audit requirements, and applicable regulations. Any exceptions must be approved through the formal change and risk-acceptance process.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to click Apply Now and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 30 July 2026
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

description:

Ziauddin Kamal Hospital is a 20-bed private healthcare

skills.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for
the end-to-end production of all visual and written content across our digital
platforms. This includes graphic design, video production, copywriting, and
community management. Crucially, this role is fully equipped —the

lighting, etc.) and software to execute tasks independently from day one.
2. Key Responsibilities

·
Conceptualize, design, and produce high-quality static graphics,
carousels, infographics, and animated assets for social media and digital
advertising.
·
Create and edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks,
YouTube Shorts, Facebook) including filming, trimming, color grading, audio
mixing, and motion graphics.
·
Ensure all visual content aligns with brand guidelines and

·
Write compelling, engaging, and on-brand captions, headlines,
and scripts that drive audience engagement and conversions.
·
Adapt tone of voice for different platforms (e.g., professional
for LinkedIn, casual for Instagram/TikTok).
·
Proofread and edit all copy to ensure accuracy and grammatical

·
Manage the daily publishing schedule across all social media
channels.
·
Monitor trends, competitor activity, and audience insights to

·
Track and report on key performance metrics (reach, engagement,
conversion) and adjust tactics accordingly.
·
Engage with the online community by responding to comments and
messages in a timely manner.

As this is a fully self-sufficient role, the candidate must own and maintain the following equipment:
· Laptop/Computer: A high-performance machine (Mac or PC) capable of running video editing and design software smoothly (minimum 16GB RAM, dedicated GPU preferred).

Education & Experience
· Relevant Qualification in in Marketing, Communications, Graphic Design, Film, or a related field (or equivalent professional experience).

Technical Skills

· Strong understanding of social media algorithms, best practices, and analytics tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite, Sprout Social, Later).

Soft Skills
· Exceptional storytelling and visual communication skills.
· Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet tight deadlines.
· Highly organized with strong attention to detail.
· Adaptable and open to feedback.
5. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
· Growth in follower count and engagement rate across platforms.
· Quality and consistency of visual assets produced per week.
· Adherence to the content calendar and project deadlines.
· Performance of video content (views, watch time, click-through rates).

Submission Guidelines

1. Resume / CV
2. Portfolio / Showreel (must include examples of graphic design, video editing, and social media copy). provide links in CV or Cover letter.

title: System/ Customer Support Officer
description:
Role Summary
The System/Customer Support Officer is responsible for 24/7 monitoring of UA Telecom’s wireless network devices, recording and resolving customer complaints and technical incidents through the support lifecycle, and performing multi-level troubleshooting across network and customer systems to ensure service continuity, SLA compliance, and uninterrupted service delivery.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Record and manage customer complaint history in the designated system, ensuring continuous follow-up until full resolution.
2. Log and maintain records of site failures, power issues, and network downtime for SLA tracking and reconciliation.
3. Monitor network performance tools (Red EMCO) for microwave and InfiNet devices, including ping latency and interference analysis, and support corrective actions to ensure timely issue resolution.
4. Monitor Air Control Alerting systems for network devices including device online/offline status, pole movement alerts, interference issues, hotspot connectivity failures, CCQ degradation, and bitrate issues, and take corrective or escalated action as required.
5. Maintain overall health monitoring of network devices in accordance with standard points.
6. Provide second-line and limited third-line technical support for customer and network-related issues.
7. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to BTS sites, PTP links, wireless sectors, switches, routers, and other network infrastructure.
8. Perform troubleshooting and configuration support for network switches, including implementation of advanced features when required.
9. Resolve customer-side issues related to CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) and LAN networks using remote access tools.
10. Support firmware and IOS/software upgrades for wireless and network devices based on vendor updates and operational requirements.
11. Identify, analyze, and resolve customer connectivity issues remotely using diagnostic and remote support tools.
12. Generate and share weekly reports of inactive/non-usage customers with Sales, CRM, and Collections teams for further action.
13. Escalate bandwidth and capacity-related issues to CRM and Sales teams for review and adjustment of customer packages.
14. Maintain accurate records of customer installations in the designated database, including customer name, connected base station details, router model, bandwidth allocation (day/night), contact details (POC), and technical configuration information.
15. Record and manage demo customers’ complaints and ensure follow-up until resolution in the designated system.
16. Maintain hotspot user records in centralized databases, including credentials, package details, validity, and access point information.
17. Update internal communication groups (e.g., WhatsApp groups) for new installations, link termination, and network incident notifications, and inform customers of urgent technical issues when required.
18. Coordinate and arrange field teams for on-site visits when remote troubleshooting is not sufficient.
19. Maintain complete documentation of system monitoring events, incidents, and customer complaints in designated databases.
20. Respond to all customer inquiries, calls, emails, and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
21. Communicate planned and unplanned maintenance activities, outages, and service issues to customers via email, phone, or messaging platforms, ensuring confirmation and status updates.
22. Schedule and communicate maintenance activities for base stations, ensuring customers are notified at least 48 hours in advance.
23. Prepare shift-wise reports detailing completed tasks, ongoing incidents, and pending issues.
24. Ensure proper handover of all active tickets, incidents, and operational tasks to the next shift for continuity of service.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (BCS).
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/network operations, preferably in ISP or telecom environments.
Strong communication skills with ability to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English (spoken and written).
Working knowledge of Linux operating systems and programming/scripting fundamentals.
Work Conditions
This role operates in a 24/7 shift-based NOC environment at UA Telecom. With full accountability for continuous system monitoring and customer service operations. It requires real-time incident detection, immediate response, and strict escalation management to ensure service continuity and rapid resolution of network and customer issues.
The position requires rotational shifts, including nights, weekends, and public holidays, and demands high responsiveness in a fast-paced, time-critical environment.
Desirable Qualifications/Plus Points:
· Certifications such as Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Cisco Certified Network Associate – Wireless (CCNA Wireless), Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP), and Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) are highly advantageous for this role.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by July 31, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.
